guidance: Prefer water, unsweetened lemon water, or unsweetened tea instead of sugary drinks.
reason: Sugary drinks can quickly raise carbohydrate load.
safety_notes: Educational guidance only. User should follow clinician-specific diet instructions.

guidance: Use roasted chana, sprouts, fruit with curd, or a protein snack instead of deep-fried snacks most days.
reason: Substitution supports calorie control without removing local food context.
safety_notes: Avoid extreme restriction. Adapt for allergies and medical diet restrictions.

guidance: Check sodium/salt on packaged foods and prefer fresh, lower-salt options when possible.
reason: High sodium intake can affect BP control for many users.
safety_notes: Do not change prescribed BP medicine based on food advice.
